'''wojawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bymoviral|bymoviral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bymoviral|bymoviral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wojawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojawithi|wojawithi]] || [[word:wojawiji|wojawiji]] || [[word:wojawishi|wojawishi]] || [[word:wojawiki|wojawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojawuthuthu|wojawuthuthu]] || [[word:wojawujuju|wojawujuju]] || [[word:wojawushushu|wojawushushu]] || [[word:wojawukuku|wojawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojawuthu|wojawuthu]] || [[word:wojawuju|wojawuju]] || [[word:wojawushu|wojawushu]] || [[word:wojawuku|wojawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojawufthuf|wojawufthuf]] || [[word:wojawufjuf|wojawufjuf]] || [[word:wojawufshuf|wojawufshuf]] || [[word:wojawufkuf|wojawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojawethe|wojawethe]] || [[word:wojaweje|wojaweje]] || [[word:wojaweshe|wojaweshe]] || [[word:wojaweke|wojaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojawothotho|wojawothotho]] || [[word:wojawojojo|wojawojojo]] || [[word:wojawoshosho|wojawoshosho]] || [[word:wojawokoko|wojawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojawotho|wojawotho]] || [[word:wojawojo|wojawojo]] || [[word:wojawosho|wojawosho]] || [[word:wojawoko|wojawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojawofthof|wojawofthof]] || [[word:wojawofjof|wojawofjof]] || [[word:wojawofshof|wojawofshof]] || [[word:wojawofkof|wojawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfthÃŸf|wojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfjÃŸf|wojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfshÃŸf|wojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfkÃŸf|wojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wojawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wojawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wojawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wojawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfthÃŸf|wojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfjÃŸf|wojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfshÃŸf|wojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfkÃŸf|wojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfthÃŸf|wojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfjÃŸf|wojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfshÃŸf|wojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wojawÃŸfkÃŸf|wojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojawÃḊthÃḊ|wojawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wojawÃḊjÃḊ|wojawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wojawÃḊshÃḊ|wojawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wojawÃḊkÃḊ|wojawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojawathatha|wojawathatha]] || [[word:wojawajaja|wojawajaja]] || [[word:wojawashasha|wojawashasha]] || [[word:wojawakaka|wojawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojawatha|wojawatha]] || [[word:wojawaja|wojawaja]] || [[word:wojawasha|wojawasha]] || [[word:wojawaka|wojawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojawafthaf|wojawafthaf]] || [[word:wojawafjaf|wojawafjaf]] || [[word:wojawafshaf|wojawafshaf]] || [[word:wojawafkaf|wojawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wojawasha|wojawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojawshÃḋsha|wojawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojawrosha|wojawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojawmusha|wojawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojawyasha|wojawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojawnkshÃḋsha|gowojawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojawnkrosha|gowojawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojawnkmusha|gowojawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojawnkyasha|gowojawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wojajawasha|wojajawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojajawshÃḋsha|wojajawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojajawrosha|wojajawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojajawmusha|wojajawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojajawyasha|wojajawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojajawnkshÃḋsha|gowojajawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojajawnkrosha|gowojajawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojajawnkmusha|gowojajawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojajawnkyasha|gowojajawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wejÃḊwasha|wejÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wejÃḊwshÃḋsha|wejÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wejÃḊwrosha|wejÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wejÃḊwmusha|wejÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wejÃḊwyasha|wejÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowejÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gowejÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowejÃḊwnkrosha|gowejÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowejÃḊwnkmusha|gowejÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowejÃḊwnkyasha|gowejÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wojfawasha|wojfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojfawshÃḋsha|wojfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojfawrosha|wojfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojfawmusha|wojfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojfawyasha|wojfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojfawnkshÃḋsha|gowojfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojfawnkrosha|gowojfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojfawnkmusha|gowojfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojfawnkyasha|gowojfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
